name: Banana Cake
recipeIngredient: Sea Foam Frosting or Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease two 9-inch round layer cake pans.
3. Line the bottoms with parchment or waxed paper, then grease and sprinkle with flour to coat completely. Shake out any excess flour and set aside.
4. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter until creamy. Gradually add the sugar, beating until fluffy.
6. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the vanilla extract.
7. Alternately mix in the dry ingredients with the bananas and buttermilk until the batter is smooth and blended. Fold in the chopped nuts.
8. Spoon the batter into the prepared pans.
9. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool on wire racks for about 10 minutes. Remove the cakes from the pans and continue cooling.
11. Frost once completely cool.
